title: Dietitians and Nutritionists
description: Plan and conduct food service or nutritional programs to assist in the promotion of health and control of disease. May supervise activities of a department providing quantity food services, counsel individuals, or conduct nutritional research.

tasks.text: Assess nutritional needs, diet restrictions, and current health plans to develop and implement dietary-care plans and provide nutritional counseling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate laboratory tests in preparing nutrition recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel individuals and groups on basic rules of good nutrition, healthy eating habits, and nutrition monitoring to improve their quality of life.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise patients and their families on nutritional principles, dietary plans, diet modifications, and food selection and preparation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Incorporate patient cultural, ethnic, or religious preferences and needs in the development of nutrition plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with physicians and health care personnel to determine nutritional needs and diet restrictions of patient or client.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record and evaluate patient and family health and food history, including symptoms, environmental toxic exposure, allergies, medication factors, and preventive health-care measures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop recipes and menus to address special nutrition needs, such as low glycemic, low histamine, or gluten- or allergen-free.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate diet counseling services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop curriculum and prepare manuals, visual aids, course outlines, and other materials used in teaching.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, conduct, and evaluate dietary, nutritional, and epidemiological research.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct training programs in dietetics, nutrition, and institutional management and administration for medical students, health-care personnel, and the general public.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write research reports and other publications to document and communicate research findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, train, and supervise workers who plan, prepare, and serve meals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make recommendations regarding public policy, such as nutrition labeling, food fortification, or nutrition standards for school programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage quantity food service departments or clinical and community nutrition services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor food service operations to ensure conformance to nutritional, safety, sanitation and quality standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect meals served for conformance to prescribed diets and standards of palatability and appearance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Purchase food in accordance with health and safety codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop policies for food service or nutritional programs to assist in health promotion and disease control.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize, develop, analyze, test, and prepare special meals, such as low-fat, low-cholesterol, or chemical-free meals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise food service managers and organizations on sanitation, safety procedures, menu development, budgeting, and planning to assist with establishment, operation, and evaluation of food service facilities and nutrition programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and administer budgets for food, equipment, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, conduct, and evaluate nutrigenomic or nutrigenetic research.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate recipe development and standardization and develop new menus for independent food service operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and prepare grant proposals to request program funding.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test new food products and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with design, building, and equipment personnel to plan for construction and remodeling of food service units.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
